description: Disaster Relief - EU: Civil Protection, Red Cross, ECHO, Member States

meshes.name: rescEU Firefighting Aircraft (It is equipped for flood response with water pump attachments bolted to the side panels, extended mud guards, an elevated air intake snorkel on the cab, and a sandbag rack welded to the roof.
